title: Kla (clan)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:YlenicItkla-JATM.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Jedi Knight Ylenic It'kla]]
'''Kla''' was one of the [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] maternal clans. Famous members include [[Ylenic It'kla]] and [[Elegos A'Kla]].

==Famous members==
*[[Ylenic It'kla]]
*[[Elegos A'Kla]]
*[[Releqy A'Kla]]
